items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the persona scenario.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires a deterministic validation of the persona scenario regarding the 'Time-limited accept/decline window'. However, there is no concrete evidence provided that demonstrates the functionality or behavior of this scenario. The linked use cases and prior evidence do not include specific details or API interactions that confirm the expected behavior, leading to an inconclusive status.
